title: Englerophytum iturense

uses: Englerophytum iturense has been traditionally used in West African medicine for various purposes. Its roots and leaves are valued for their medicinal properties, which are believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is also used in the treatment of wounds and as a remedy for snake bites. Further research is needed to confirm the efficacy and safety of Englerophytum iturense for medicinal use.
